name: Orapi SA
summary: Orapi SA, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells professional hygiene products and industrial process products worldwide. The company provides cleaning and disinfection products, and products for equipment and machine upkeep. It serves transportation, health care, and other industries; municipalities; cleaning and property management companies; and recreation/shops. The company was founded in 1968 and is based in Saint-Vulbas, France.
